caption: In a professional studio setting, three people are positioned around small white round tables. A man on the left wears a dark suit and speaks while gesturing with his hands. A woman in the center wears a dark blazer over a pink top and light-colored trousers, sitting calmly. A man on the right wears a patterned olive-green jacket and dark trousers, standing near a large vertical banner. The banner features a close-up image of two hands shaking and the text "PRAKTIJK EN ZORGVRAAG". Each table is equipped with a microphone and a bottle of water. In the background, a row of empty light blue chairs is visible. Across the sequence, the man on the left continues to gesture and speak, while the woman remains seated and the man on the right stands still. The "mediasite" logo appears at the top of the scene.
